name: DoubleVerify Digital Ad Verification API
what_it_does: DoubleVerify REST API for digital advertising verification, brand safety, and media quality measurement platform. Enables AI agents to manage advertiser brand safety segment and blocking rule configuration, handle viewability measurement and threshold reporting across channels, access invalid traffic (IVT) and fraud detection metrics for campaign quality, retrieve brand safety incident reporting and content adjacency analysis, manage pre-bid targeting segment activation for brand safe inventory selection, handle connected TV (CTV) and video verification measurement, access attention measurement and engagement quality analytics, retrieve fraud and bot traffic blocking effectiveness reporting, manage segment configuration and brand safety keyword lists, and integrate verification data with DSPs, ad servers, and marketing analytics platforms.
use_cases: Configuring brand safety segments from campaign management agents
Monitoring IVT and fraud rates from ad quality agents
Reporting on viewability across channels from media measurement agents
Activating pre-bid brand safe inventory from programmatic agents
not_for: Publisher monetization without advertiser brand safety and media quality focus
Consumer advertising without enterprise digital advertising quality management
Non-programmatic advertising without ad server and DSP integration context
best_when: An advertiser or agency using DoubleVerify wants AI agents to automate brand safety configuration, IVT monitoring, viewability reporting, pre-bid activation, and integration with DSP and ad server platforms.
avoid_when: BUDGET RISK: Aggressive pre-bid brand safety filtering can significantly reduce available inventory and increase CPMs — balance brand safety requirements with scale. Automated brand safety keyword updates require human review; overly broad blocking can prevent advertising on legitimate content. IVT detection is probabilistic; some legitimate traffic may be flagged.

auth.notes: DoubleVerify uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. Per-advertiser credentials. Developer portal at developers.doubleverify.com. No native webhooks — polling-based reporting. Integration with all major DSPs (The Trade Desk, DV360, Amazon DSP) and ad servers. Pre-bid segments activated via DSP data management integration. Acquired Meetrics (2021) for European measurement.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; measurement volume and product modules determine pricing
pricing.notes: New York City, New York. Founded 2008. Public company (DV, NYSE). Digital advertising verification market. $500M+ revenue (2023). 2,000+ advertisers. Partners with all major DSPs and social platforms. Fusion AI for media quality prediction. Competes with Integral Ad Science (IAS) for ad verification market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in API reference

known_agent_gotchas: BUDGET RISK: Pre-bid brand safety filtering reduces available inventory; aggressive blocking increases CPMs — calibrate blocking thresholds with inventory availability data
Pre-bid segment activation — brand safety pre-bid segments are activated via DSP integration, not direct API; understand DSP-specific activation workflow
Probabilistic fraud detection — IVT detection uses probabilistic scoring; some false positives exist; validate blocking against campaign performance before over-filtering
Report latency — verification measurement reports have 24-48 hour latency; real-time bidding decisions use pre-bid segments, not post-bid reporting
MRC accreditation — DoubleVerify measurement is MRC-accredited; leverage accreditation for client reporting and agency compliance requirements
CTV measurement complexity — connected TV verification has lower coverage than web/mobile; verify CTV measurement capabilities for specific streaming environments
agent_readiness.security_notes: Ad verification and brand safety. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, MRC. OAuth2/API key. US/EU. Campaign verification and brand safety data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Ad verification. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Campaign verification and brand safety data.
